policies.name: Structural hierarchy
policies.description: Baseline (required): database → table → column from analyzed metadata. Aligns with OpenLineage dataset/field hierarchy and DAMA physical metadata layers.

config.use_case: Automatic containment from semantic mapping saves

policies.name: Stitch columns by matching full name
policies.description: Industry: MDM entity resolution. Link columns across databases when names match exactly (e.g. customer_id in CRM and warehouse).

config.use_case: Find duplicate identifiers across source systems

policies.name: Stitch by logical attribute name
policies.description: Industry: semantic / business metadata (Collibra, Informatica EDC). Link columns sharing the same logical data attribute from semantic mapping.

config.use_case: Connect physically different columns that mean the same business concept

policies.name: Stitch by business glossary term
policies.description: Industry: business glossary alignment (DAMA-DMBOK, ISO 11179). Link columns assigned to the same glossary term during steward review.

config.use_case: Trace data elements to approved business terms across domains

policies.name: Stitch tables by matching name
policies.description: Industry: data mesh / federated catalogs. Link tables with the same name across databases (e.g. customers in OLTP vs analytics lake).

config.use_case: Relate operational and analytical copies of the same entity table

policies.name: PII columns to compliance ledger
policies.description: Industry: privacy (GDPR Art. 30, CCPA). Route confidential / PII columns to the GDPR Compliance Ledger report for processing inventory.

config.use_case: Build privacy impact and processing-activity views

policies.name: HIPAA PHI to compliance ledger
policies.description: Industry: healthcare (HIPAA minimum necessary). Route PHI-related columns to the compliance ledger for access and disclosure tracking.

policies.name: Financial columns to revenue dashboard
policies.description: Industry: finance / BI lineage. Route payment and revenue-related columns to the Sales & Revenue Dashboard.

config.use_case: Impact analysis before changing revenue or payment fields

policies.name: SOX control fields to audit report
policies.description: Industry: SOX ITGC. Route general-ledger and control-relevant columns to the compliance ledger for audit trail lineage.

config.use_case: Audit readiness for financial reporting systems

policies.name: Risk data to revenue dashboard
policies.description: Industry: banking (BCBS 239). Link risk and exposure columns used in regulatory aggregation to the revenue/risk dashboard.

config.use_case: Lineage for risk data aggregation and reportability
